posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The amount of activities in notes in some of our records has gotten to the point where (although we need them all), it is a lot to sort through. If I need to find a note I made in order to reference the content, it’s difficult to find - even if I filter by internal note or activity, as either there are many to scroll through, or you don’t recall if it was an internal note, or an activity. The ability to filter by user and type would be very helpful.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to filter by user and type in the emails and activities tab
